title: Yevel 1 (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Yevel 1}}

'''Yevel 1''' is the 1<sup>st</sup> Yevel of the Yerooms.{{Class 1}}
==Description==
[[File:Yevel1.jpg|thumb|240x240px|A photo of '''Yevel 1''' with Ye. Behind them, the 'Yes Men' can be seen.]]'''Yevel 1''' resembles a well-maintained open field. The field spreads across thousands of miles. Random areas may have minimum plateaus, with an extremely artificial look to it. The sky maintains its distinct blue color and the fairly hot star through all times, with no documents registering night periods.

The field exclusively grows grass, with no distinct flora reported. It is said to be '<nowiki/>''strangely green and vivid''<nowiki/>' and '''perfect for long explorations''<nowiki/>'. The grass is arable, in exemplary conditions to grow crops. In the distance, a collection of steep-sided canyons can be seen, with an ominous, slightly purple fog behind it<ref>The color purple was chosen by Ye himself, as referenced in a tweet: 'Sending purple emojis   When I’m dealing with mental shit...'</ref>.

Another property that is characteristic of '''Yevel 1''' is the constant music in certain parts of the territory. Early reports suggested that the noise extends from the ground, as the sound materializes as very hummed noises; it can be frequently seen around the plateaus, but one could encounter one source in a random part of the level. It is often documented as "a distinct mix of [[Ye (Joke)|Ye's]] magical instrumentals, with the samples from the vigorous rock and trap genres all the way to very mellow gospel and R&B mixes".
==Colonies and Outposts==
No colonies or outposts have been established at Yevel 1, although conditions are adequate for it.
==Entities==
===[[Ye (Joke)|Ye]]===
Ye can be seen around the plateaus of the level, around a group of Facelings, commonly denominated as the 'Yes Men', dancing and performing Christian-themed songs ecstatically.

He commonly wears a monochrome outfit matching as those found within the Yes Men members, either in a light blue or lavender coloration.
===Ye's Men===
The Yes Men are always and only seen on '''Yevel 1'''. Wherever Ye goes, the Yes Men go behind him. They aren't an entity per se, rather a group of Facelings, clothed similarly to Ye. Their function on the yevel seems to be a supporting cast to the 'main character', mimicking or simulating the movements that their leader makes. According to further studies by the M.E.G, they aren't self-conscious and rational enough to discern what they do, instead just agreeing and going along with their leader, hence the name.<ref>Brain activity has been identified, although not enough to act on their own.</ref>
==Entrances and Exits==
===Entrances===
*One can enter the Yerooms and consequently '''Yevel 1''' by haphazardly noclipping out of the Backrooms;
*Gathering early drafts of works made by Ye in the Frontrooms can lead you to this level.
===Exits===
*The safest way to leave this level is by participating in one of the performances along with Ye and the Yes Men and staying until the end. This will make one no-clip into [[Yevel 2]].
